synopsis.regime_summary: Composite score rises to 29.5 from 28.3, maintaining ACCUMULATE regime with modest bullish momentum and moderate confidence.
key_signals: Reserve Risk at 0.0012 confirms accumulation zone depth
LTH-SOPR at 0.819 shows long-term holders realizing losses
Mayer Multiple at 0.906 indicates price below 200-day MA
RHODL at 1,733 well within accumulation threshold
synopsis.thesis: Bitcoin remains in a clear accumulation phase with 4/10 accumulation rules firing and no cycle-top signals active. The combination of suppressed Reserve Risk, LTH capitulation, and below-trend pricing suggests the market is in a classic bottoming formation. MVRV at 1.41 and NUPL at 0.29 indicate moderate but not extreme valuations.
risk_factors: STH-MVRV momentum could reverse if recent recovery stalls
Supply in profit at 62% near accumulation threshold could trigger selling
Transfer volume ratio at 0.857 approaching bearish momentum territory
synopsis.action_bias: Maintain systematic ACCUMULATE stance as composite score remains well within 25-45 range with supportive on-chain fundamentals.
